untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order book microstructure data (existing orders at price level P, time precedence, bid-ask spread, price improvement ticks) which are not available in the allowed price/technical indicators list. The core concept—improving price to gain queue priority—cannot be expressed using OHLCV or standard technical indicators alone. This is a market microstructure rule requiring Level 2 data and order management logic, not a price-action pattern.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using ADX_14 to detect TRENDING regime as specified in target_regimes, but the fundamental signal (price improvement priority mechanics) is untranslatable without order book state variables. A production implementation would require custom order management logic with real-time bid-ask and queue depth monitoring.
